case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. JULIAN KEIPPEL et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT KEIPPEL, JULIAN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-09-2014
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-27-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-27-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
